name: Entur Geocoder API
description: Geocoding API for Norway and Sweden by Entur. Query addresses, Points of Interest (POI), and public transport stops. Based on the open source Pelias geocoder. Primary purpose is finding start and end points for journey planner queries through an autosuggest interface.
